ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the incident */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the incident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_area" TEXT /* Area affected by the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident (Open/Close) */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target of the shooting (e.g., random, coworkers) */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Cause of the incident */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the incident */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Number of injured individuals */,
  "total_victims" INTEGER /* Total number of victims */,
  "policeman_killed" INTEGER /* Number of policemen killed */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the perpetrator */,
  "employed" TEXT /* Indicates if the perpetrator was employed (Y/N) */,
  "employed_at" TEXT /* If employed, the place of employment */,
  "mental_health_issues" TEXT /* Indicates if there were mental health issues (Y/N) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the perpetrator */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the perpetrator */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., mass shooting, terrorist attack) */,
  "weapon_type" TEXT /* Type of weapon used (e.g., handgun, rifle, shotgun) */,
  "ammunition_used" TEXT /* Type and amount of ammunition used */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "investigation_status" TEXT /* Current status of the investigation (e.g., ongoing, closed) */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident the victim is associated with */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the victim */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the victim (e.g., injured, deceased) */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the victim was injured (Y/N) */,
  "fatality" INTEGER /* Indicates if the victim was fatal (Y/N) */,
  "mental_health_issues" INTEGER /* Indicates if there were mental health issues reported for the victim (Y/N) */,
  "victim_name" TEXT /* Full name of the victim */,
  "victim_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the victim to the perpetrator (e.g., family member, friend, stranger) */,
  "victim_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the victim */,
  "victim_education" TEXT /* Education level of the victim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victims_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "perpetrators" (
  "perpetrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each perpetrator record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident the perpetrator is associated with */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the perpetrator */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the perpetrator */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the perpetrator */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the perpetrator was employed (Y/N) */,
  "employed_at" TEXT /* If employed, the place of employment */,
  "mental_health_issues" INTEGER /* Indicates if there were mental health issues reported (Y/N) */,
  "perpetrator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the perpetrator */,
  "perpetrator_alias" TEXT /* Alias or pseudonym used by the perpetrator */,
  "perpetrator_history" TEXT /* Previous convictions or history of violent behavior */,
  "perpetrator_motivation" TEXT /* Motivation behind the incident (e.g., financial, personal, ideological) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perpetrator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_perpetrators_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident being responded to */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time taken to respond to the incident */,
  "officers_involved" INTEGER /* Number of officers involved in the response */,
  "casualties_included" INTEGER /* Indicates if there were casualties among the responding officers (Y/N) */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., police, SWAT, emergency medical services) */,
  "response_time_interval" TEXT /* Time interval between the incident report and response */,
  "officer_names" TEXT /* Names of officers involved in the response */,
  "officer_badge_numbers" TEXT /* Badge numbers of officers involved in the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident associated with the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., public, private, commercial) */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident associated with the cause */,
  "cause_type" TEXT /* Type of cause (e.g., unknown, mental health issues) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cause as reported */,
  "cause_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cause */,
  "cause_category" TEXT /* Category of the cause (e.g., mental health, financial, ideological) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_causes_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the victim associated with the injury */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., gunshot wound, trauma) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, critical) */,
  "treatment_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if treatment is required (Y/N) */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "treatment_provided" TEXT /* Treatment provided to the victim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_victim_id FOREIGN KEY ("victim_id") REFERENCES victims ("victim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "law_enforcement_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the law enforcement agency */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the agency */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of law enforcement agency (e.g., local, state, federal) */,
  "agency_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident associated with the report */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the media report */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL of the media report */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Author of the media report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, officer) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., admin, analyst, officer) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., law enforcement, research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_response" (
  "agency_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency response record */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency that responded */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response record */,
  "agency_response_time" TEXT /* Time taken by the agency to respond */,
  "agency_officers_involved" INTEGER /* Number of officers from the agency involved in the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agency_response_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES law_enforcement_agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agency_response_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)
